title: OpenClaw Agent Config
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for per-agent `.openclaw/agent-config.yaml` files. Consumed by the gateway's lockfile generator to mint a stable handle_id -> capabilities binding and to enforce the v1 contract (single-turn bridge, capability-based dispatch, allowed_channels gating, heartbeat liveness, max_bridge_depth=1). The schema is intentionally permissive on optional fields so v1 agents can opt out of features (heartbeat, canary) they do not need.

schema_version.description: Schema revision of this file. Currently the string "1". Bumped together with contract_version when shape changes.

handle_id.description: UUID v4 minted by gateway at first deploy. Lockfile key, not handle.

contract_version.description: Contract obligations this agent binds to. Currently "v1"; v2 requires a written migration in docs/contracts/v2.md.

capabilities.description: Capability tags this agent advertises for dispatch when @handle is omitted.

allowed_channels.description: Discord snowflake IDs (17-20 digits) the agent may be routed into. Rejected outside the set; dry-run logs, enforcement refuses.

role.description: Agent role: 'executor' runs actions, 'advisor' answers only.

enabled.description: Whether the gateway should ping this agent on interval_hours.

heartbeat.description: Heartbeat configuration. If enabled, gateway pings every interval_hours and quarantines the agent after 2 missed pongs.

canary.description: If true, this agent participates in the canary rollout pool.

max_bridge_depth.description: Maximum @A ask @B bridge depth this agent accepts (0 = no bridges, 1 = single bridge). Enforced at gateway, not agent policy.
